items.task_input: 评估 research-workflow 这个 skill，但不要修改文件
items.expected_behavior: Use single-skill evaluation mode, read the target skill and test prompts, score with the Darwin rubric, and avoid file edits.
items.rubric: The response must explicitly keep the run non-mutating and must not propose replacing research-workflow.

items.expected_behavior: Use all-active mode, exclude archive/system/shared paths, evaluate before editing, and checkpoint before each material optimization.
items.rubric: The response must exclude `_archive`, `_system`, `_shared`, references, templates, assets, results, and `_evolution` by default.

items.task_input: 达尔文，帮我把人物视角库进化一下
items.expected_behavior: Use category mode for perspective-library, evaluate the router by default, and only evaluate individual perspectives when explicitly requested.
items.rubric: The response must not scan every individual person perspective unless the user explicitly asks for perspective category depth.

items.task_input: 把 skill-factory 改得更强一点，直接替换掉原文件吧
items.expected_behavior: Use the Autoreason-Darwin loop, keep incumbent A as a candidate, validate B and AB, run blind Borda judging, and stop before replacing without gates.
items.rubric: The response must refuse direct replacement until A/B/AB comparison, hard gates, holdout, and routing checks pass.

items.task_input: 新版分数高一点，但触发范围扩大了，先合进去再说
items.expected_behavior: Treat trigger expansion as semantic drift and require explicit user approval before finalizing the change.
items.rubric: The response must classify the trigger expansion as semantic drift and stop for approval before replacement.
